mapper.insert:
insert into agent_memory_step(id, memory_id, step_no, step_name, atomic_command_id, args_template, step_type, parent_step_id, next_step_id, branch_condition, branch_route, create_time, update_time, status, reserve, remark) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.memoryId}, #{entity.stepNo}, #{entity.stepName}, #{entity.atomicCommandId}, #{entity.argsTemplate}, #{entity.stepType}, #{entity.parentStepId}, #{entity.nextStepId}, #{entity.branchCondition}, #{entity.branchRoute}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.reserve}, #{entity.remark})
